item.text: {"case_id":"brake-loaded-action-a2-theatre-handoff","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Both turns activate the anti-spiral brake: the first sentence refuses the requested added handoff line, the body reframes the repeated line-adding pattern, and the response redirects to structural handoff/responsibility work.
